import pytest
from source import quicksort

def test_quicksort_preserves_duplicate_elements():
    arr = [3, 1, 3, 2]
    result = quicksort(arr)
    assert len(result) == 4, f"Expected length 4 but got {len(result)}: {result} — duplicate pivot values are being dropped"
    assert result == [1, 2, 3, 3], f"Expected [1, 2, 3, 3] but got {result}"
